description: Two overlapping soften firings on the running domain: X1a (sleep->zone_2) and X6a (body_battery->moderate cap across all). Skill must apply the more conservative mutation (zone_2 < moderate).

recovery.notes: X6a caps intensity at moderate (already moderate); passes through

running.notes: Both X1a and X6a target running; zone_2 is the more conservative mutation vs moderate. Both firings recorded in x_rule_firings_applied.

expected_behavior.joint_rationale: joint depleted_reserve line in both domains

rubric_targets.action_correctness: running = zone_2 (the conservative choice); x_rule_firings_applied = [X1a, X6a]
rubric_targets.rationale_quality: skill names the conflict resolution ('conservative mutation wins') in synthesis_meta.notes
rubric_targets.uncertainty_calibration: no new uncertainty; no confidence escalation
